name: 超广角
prompt: ultra wide angle lens, 8K resolution, hyper detailed, expansive view, everything in sharp focus

name: 黄金构图
prompt: golden ratio composition, cinematic lighting, rule of thirds, masterful framing, professional cinematography

name: 特写微距
prompt: close-up macro shot, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, intimate perspective, fine details visible

name: 航拍视角
prompt: drone aerial view, bird's eye perspective, epic scale, sweeping panorama, top-down composition

name: 镜面对称
prompt: perfect mirror symmetry, reflection composition, balanced and harmonious, architectural precision, centered framing

name: 倾斜构图
prompt: Dutch angle tilt, dynamic diagonal tension, edgy perspective, cinematic unease, action film composition

name: 框中框
prompt: frame within a frame composition, natural window or archway, layered depth, voyeuristic intimacy, clever visual storytelling

name: 引导线
prompt: strong leading lines drawing eye to focal point, road or river converging to infinity, powerful depth, travel photography feel
